description: LATAM music-CMO reference directory — the 13 member societies of ALCAM (Alianza Latinoamericana de Autores y Compositores de Música) across 12 countries, with a linkage pointer to atana.ecad for the Brazilian pair (ABRAMUS, UBC). A join key for any future per-society headline series across LATAM.
source: alcammusica.org/sociedades, captured 2026-05-25. The Atana build inlines the 13 rows verbatim from the page; the URL of each society remains the authoritative source for its official name.
